TENANT_WELCOME_EMAIL:
Welcome to iRoad — your logistics workspace is ready!
{% load static %}

iRoad

Logistics Management Platform

Welcome{% if company_name %}, {{ company_name }}{% endif %}! 🎉

Your subscriber workspace has been provisioned and is ready to use. Below you'll find your sign-in credentials and integration keys to get started.

{% if portal_bootstrap_password %}

Account Credentials

Login email: {{ tenant.primary_email }}

Initial password: (change after first sign-in)

{{ portal_bootstrap_password }}
{% if portal_login_url %}
Open Workspace Sign-in →
{% endif %} {% endif %}

Tenant Identifier

Use with X-Tenant-ID header on API calls:

{{ tenant.tenant_id }}

API Bridge Key

Authentication secret for the bridge endpoint. Store this securely — it is never shown in the Control Panel; email is the only delivery channel.

{{ api_bridge_key }}

Send your Tenant ID and this key on each request using X-Tenant-API-Key (or Authorization: Bearer). After verification, the platform applies your tenant scope on shared master data.

Daily operational data stays in your isolated workspace. After sign-in, your access token includes tenant_id so clients can scope data correctly.
